pages.title: Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging Stations | Electrify America
pages.description: Charge your electric vehicle in as little as 30 minutes with Electrify America, the nation’s largest open Hyper-Fast charging network.
pages.content:
[Skip to content](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/#main)

# Find Fast Electric Vehicle Charging

![](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/mainImg.7defaeb0.jpg)

# Charge First

More chargers, more freedom. Since 2016, Electrify America has made EV charging more accessible. Now, we’re powering your EV journey as the largest open Hyper-Fast charging network in the U.S.

![Charging Icon](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/charger-icon.60ad5045.png)

5,600+

Hyper-Fast EV Chargers

in North America

![Location Icon](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/station-icon.39575487.png)

1,080+

EV Charging Stations

in North America

# Charge Easy

Hundreds of thousands of EV owners rely on our coast-to-coast network every week. No matter if you're heading to work, running errands, or road-tripping across the country, you can count on us to keep you moving. Plug in. Power up. Go.

[![Find Electrify America charging stations using your smart phone](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/mobile-app.203ffe16.png)](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/mobile-app/)

### [Mobile  App](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/mobile-app/)

Simplify the charging experience with the Electrify America app.

[![Download on the App Store](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/electrify-america/id1458030456?mt=8) [![Get it on Google Play](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ea.evowner&rdid=com.ea.evowner)

[![Person plugging an EV charger into their vehicle](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/charging101.80a6c42f.png)](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/charging-your-ev/)

### [Charging  101](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/charging-your-ev/)

We'll guide you through the charging process from beginning to end until you become a pro.

[![A picture of the renewable energy farm. A sign says Solar Glow 1.](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/passplus.ad51f69a.png)](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/pricing/)

### [Pass Plus  Membership](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/pricing/)

Become a Pass+ member to save about 25% on charging.

# Charge Forward

Built for today, ready for tomorrow — Electrify America is leading the way with more speed, a dedicated testing facility, and smarter tech, like our award-winning deployment of battery energy storage systems [(BESS)](https://media.electrifyamerica.com/releases/270).

[![A large Electriy America charging station in a parking lot](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/network-transparency.8a009a08.png)](https://bit.ly/network-upgrades-and-maintenance)

### [Network  Transparency](https://bit.ly/network-upgrades-and-maintenance)

Stay in the loop of current and planned maintenance so you can plan accordingly.

[![Large solar energy field in a desert with bright sunlight](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/renewable-energy.54ec7e44.png)](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/renewable-energy/)

### [Renewable  Energy](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/renewable-energy/)

We're building a grid-friendly charging network through Electrify America Solar GlowTM 1 and other initiatives.

[![Woman looking at her phone.](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/latest-updates.6ef271e7.png)](https://media.electrifyamerica.com/en-us/)

### [Latest  Updates](https://media.electrifyamerica.com/en-us/)

Read about our latest innovations, which power today and innovate tomorrow.

## Host or Own a Station

Whether to want to own or host a station, we'll power the entire journey for you.

[LEARN MORE →](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/business-solutions/)

![Electrify America charger in use](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/footer_charger.be8bb4a7.png)

![Happy man in a car](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/footer_mirror.1c49965c.png)

## We're Helping Communities Charge On

Whether you charge with us frequently or only during road trips, our mission is to make your charge as seamless possible, so can can plug in, power up, and go.

[ABOUT US →](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/about-us/)

pages.title: Download the Electrify America Mobile App
pages.description: Manage your Electrify America charging session right from your phone. Download our app and discover a seamless way to charge your electric vehicle (EV).
pages.content:
[Skip to content](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/mobile-app/#main)

# Download the Electrify America Mobile App

## The Electrify America Mobile App

![A completely redesigned experience](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/hero.26307c3e.png)

## Easy Charging on the Go

Use the Electrify America mobile app to find a public charging station. Sign up for an account to enjoy exclusive, members-only public charging features and pricing.

[![Download on the App Store](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/electrify-america/id1458030456?mt=8)[![Get it on Google Play](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ea.evowner&rdid=com.ea.evowner)

![Mobile app screen displaying the ability to location and get directions to chargers](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/locate_a_charger.7ef63c0d.png)

## Locate a public charger

Open the **Electrify America app** to find charging stations — whether you’re planning a trip or looking for a quick charge nearby. View real-time charger availability and connector types, including CCS, CHAdeMO, Level 2, and NACS.

Become a **Pass or Pass+ member** in our app to access real-time charger availability, get alerts when charger becomes available, and other features that make charging feel easier.

![Contactless payment within the app](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/contactless_payment@2x.6a2c87cb.png)

## Contactless payment

Sign up for a membership in the app and pay for your charge by simply tapping the charger or swiping your phone’s screen.

![View your charging history within mobile app](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/progress@2x.765443f9.png)

## Track your progress

For compatible EVs, the app shows your [state of charge (SOC)](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/glossary/) and sends you custom notifications about your session.

![View your charging history within mobile app](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/charge_history@2x.d209df00.png)

## See your charge history

Keep track of your public charging sessions, including energy delivered and start times.

![Apple Carplay and Android Auto integration available](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/in-car-display-integration.afdba630.png)![Apple Carplay and Android Auto integration available](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/google-maps.35cc394a.png)

## Enjoy the benefits of membership

Download the Electrify America app and sign up to get the most out of your charging experience

Data and texting rates may apply

### Guest Charging

Pay as you go

- Find a charging station

- Swipe or tap your debit or credit card to pay easily


ONLY IN THE APP

### Pass Membership

No monthly fee

- See real-time charger availability

- Pay contact-free from the app

- Favorite charging stations in the app

- Start charging from the app and track your progress

- Get notified when a charger opens up or your EV reaches your desired state of charge

- Find a charging station

- Swipe or tap your debit or credit card to pay easily


ONLY IN THE APP

### Pass+ Membership

$7/month

- Enjoy reduced costs for charging





Pass+ Members save about 25% on charging

- Pay-contact free from the app

- Favorite charging stations in the app

- Start charging from the app and track your progress

- Get notified when a charger opens up or your EV reaches your desired state of charge

- Find a charging station

- Swipe or tap your debit or credit card to pay easily


Pricing for DC fast charging varies by location.

[See Pricing Details](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/pricing/)

## Questions about the app?

Whether you're new to electric vehicle (EV) charging or just want to get more out of the app, our Electrify America Mobile App 101 video series is here to help.

Updating Your Credit Card in the Electrify America App - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[Updating Your Credit Card in the Electrify America App](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AqKKD66TFJ0) [Electrify America](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC3GGcyuzYYyYmZ0hJKlBb6w)

Electrify America3.22K subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AqKKD66TFJ0)

## Frequently asked questions about the mobile app

- +

## How do I use my membership plan to start a charging session at an Electrify America charger?






As an Electrify America Pass or Pass+ member, if you’ve downloaded the Electrify America app and added a valid payment method to your account, you have two ways to start a charge by smartphone:







1\. Using the [digital membership pass](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/glossary/?load=9#mobile-app), which requires tapping or holding the smartphone near the charger’s RFID reader.



  - First, plug the connector into the vehicle. Follow all steps on the charger screen before tapping or holding your phone near the reader.
  - **Android users:** Ensure that NFC is turned on in your phone settings and that the smartphone screen is unlocked before tapping the smartphone to the reader—look for the symbol below. The Electrify America app does not need to be open.
  - **iOS users:** Open Apple Wallet or the Electrify America app. Tap the smartphone to the reader on the right side of the charger—look for the symbol shown here

2\. Tap the "Start Charging" button from within the Electrify America app.

  - Ensure that your smartphone’s location services are enabled, the Electrify America app is installed on your phone, and you are logged into your account.
  - Open the app and from the map screen (or your Favorites), select the charging station where you are located. You must be near the charger to start a charge.
  - Select the charger by referring to the Charger ID number at the top of the charger’s screen, and tap to start a charging session.

![Diagram showing how to tap a smartphone to the charging station’s RFID reader.](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/tap-to-pay.d6c40725.png)![The mobile app’s “Tap to Start Charge” button.](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/tap_to_start.49e4fd19.png)

- +

## How do I pay for charging and for the Pass+ subscription fee?






When you sign up for Electrify America Pass or Pass+ in the mobile app, follow the prompts to add your credit card to your account. Then select an amount to automatically load money to your Electrify America balance.



This amount will be added to your account the first time you charge your vehicle at an Electrify America charging station after signing up. Every time your balance falls to or below $5, your account will reload with the amount you selected.



The cost for charging, idling, and any applicable taxes will be deducted from your balance at the end of your charging session.



If you’re a Pass+ member, your monthly subscription fee will be charged to your credit or debit card when you sign up and deducted from your Electrify America balance monthly thereafter.

- +

## What happens if my Electrify America account runs out of money?






If your payment method is declined during a charging session, please update it to allow Electrify America to auto-fill your account and continue charging your vehicle.



If the payment method is not updated, charging will stop when your account balance reaches $0.

- +

## Can I use the Electrify America app with CarPlay and Android Auto?






Yes! Please ensure your vehicle is compatible with CarPlay or Android Auto and your phone is up to date. Here are a few ways you can use the Electrify America app in vehicles compatible with CarPlay and Android Auto:



  - Navigate to charging stations while on the go
  - View charger details
  - Manage your charging session

- +

## What’s the latest version of software needed to use the Electrify America app with CarPlay and Android Auto?






The Electrify America app is supported on both iOS 16+ and Android 9+.

pages.title: EV Charging Subscription | Pricing Plans | Electrify America
pages.description: See Electrify America’s EV charging pricing plans. Compare subscription and pay-as-you-go options and find the plan that fits your driving needs.
pages.content:
[Skip to content](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/pricing/#main)

# Pricing and Plans for EV Charging

## Pricing and Plans for EV Charging

![Closeup of a person tapping their phone to pay at an Electrify America charging station.](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/pricing-hero.c8cc974c.png)

![](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/electric-bolt.61d41ec0.webp)

Use the Electrify America app to see real-time pricing

[![Download on the App Store](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/app-store.e3dfbb50.webp)](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/electrify-america/id1458030456?mt=8)

[![Get it on Google Play](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/play.adb0a6e1.webp)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ea.evowner&rdid=com.ea.evowner)

## Pricing Information

Pricing for DC fast charging is determined by charger location, your plan, and the maximum power level your vehicle can accept. **Real-time pricing is available in the app or at the charger.**

In the app:

- To view pricing in the app, select the station from the map

At the charger:

- View pricing on the charger screen at any station. **Idle fees may be imposed for parking time after your charging session has ended.**

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Save about 25% on charging when you sign up to be a Pass+ member via the Electrify America mobile app.

Please refer to the charger screen for the most up-to-date information concerning pricing, power levels, and idle fees for your session. You can also view these details in your Electrify America app.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)[Find a charger](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/locate-charger/)

Find your nearest station on our charger locator map.

![](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/pricing-banner.e01f8584.webp)

### Guests

Credit or debit card

Swipe or tap your card on the

credit card reader at the charger

![Credit card](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/Card.e717ecf9.webp)

### Pass or Pass+ Members

Pay contact-free with the app

Just add a card to your app

profile to pay seamlessly

[LEARN MORE](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/mobile-app/)

![Smartphone showing a digital card](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/Phone.4e02dee7.webp)

## Get Premium Offers in the app

Your vehicle could qualify for a Premium Offer. Download the Electrify America mobile app to see all plans.

[GET THE APP](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/mobile-app/)

![Closeup of a person making a contactless payment at an Electrify America charging station](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/premium-offer.e761ca3e.png)

## Frequently asked questions about payment and membership

- +

## Which payment methods do you accept?




Electrify America accepts the following payment methods:

  - Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover credit cards
  - Visa and MasterCard debit cards
  - Apple, Google, and Samsung Pay

- +

## How is pricing determined?






Pricing for DC fast charging is determined by charger location, your plan, and the amount of energy delivered. For more details, including power levels and idle fees, check the charger screen or the Electrify America app.

- +

## How do pricing levels work at different locations?






Real-time pricing is available in the app or displayed on the charger before you begin charging. Pricing for DC fast charging is determined by charger location, your plan, and the amount of energy delivered. For more details, including power levels and idle fees, check the charger screen or the Electrify America app.

- +

## How do I pay for charging and for the Pass+ subscription fee?






First, sign up for Electrify America’s Pass or Pass+ membership in the mobile app. Then, follow the prompts to add your credit card to your account and select an amount to automatically pre-load to your Electrify America wallet balance.



The first wallet auto-fill occurs the first time you charge your vehicle at an Electrify America charging station after signing up. Every time your balance falls to or below the minimum wallet threshold of $5, the wallet will be loaded again with the amount you selected.



The cost for charging, idling, and any applicable taxes will be deducted from your wallet balance at the end of your charging session.



If you’re a Pass+ member, your monthly subscription fee will be charged to your credit or debit card when you sign up, and deducted from your wallet balance monthly thereafter.

- +

## How do I change my membership plan?






To change membership plans, visit “Plan details'' in the Electrify America app. Please note that a change from Pass+ to Pass, will not be reflected until the next billing cycle. Because of this, your Electrify America Pass+ plan will remain active until the end of the current billing cycle.

- +

## How do I pay with my membership pass?








First, access your digital membership pass in your mobile wallet\*. Then tap your phone against the contactless reader on the charger.



\*NFC may need to be enabled in your phone’s settings.

![Members: Tap here to pay with plan](https://www.electrifyamerica.com/img/tap-here-to-pay@2x.0c233f6f.png)

- +

## What happens if my Electrify America mobile app wallet runs out of money?






If your payment method is declined during a charging session, please update your payment method on your account to allow Electrify America to auto-fill your wallet so that vehicle charging can continue.



If the payment method is not updated, charging will stop when your wallet balance reaches $0.

- +

## How do I switch from one membership type to another?






In the app, go to “Plan details” and follow the prompts to upgrade to Pass+ or to change plan types.



Please note that a request to change from Pass+ to Pass membership will go into effect on the first day of the next billing cycle, which coincides with the monthly anniversary of your sign-up date.

- +

## How do I delete my account?






Cancel your membership anytime in the app by navigating to your profile and selecting “Delete Account.”

- +

## Why does EV charging pricing vary by location?






Real-time pricing is available in the app or displayed on the charger before you begin charging. Pricing for DC fast charging is determined by the charger location, your plan, and the amount of energy delivered.

- +

## How can I find out the current pricing at my favorite charging location?






Real-time pricing is available in the app or displayed on the charger before you begin charging. Pricing for DC fast charging is determined by the charger location, your plan, and the amount of energy delivered.

- +

## Does this new pricing change my Premium Offer plan?






Premium Offer plans that include complimentary charging aren’t affected by these changes. Once your plan expires or you exceed your plan benefits for a session, the remainder of your charging will automatically be billed at our Pass plan pricing. You can choose to enroll in Pass+ for additional savings.

- +

## What is the cost to charge in Canada?






For more information on Canada Charging, please visit [Electrify Canada](https://www.electrify-canada.ca/) or for Canadian Pricing, please visit [Electrify Canada Pricing & Plans](https://www.electrify-canada.ca/pricing/) .
